channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: JPMorgan Outlines Why Oil Prices Need to Rise Substantially Further
Opposition to AI Data Centers Could Threaten Pennsylvania Republican Incumbents in 2026
item.description: Four competitive House races in Pennsylvania overlap with areas targeted for AI data center expansion under a plan backed by Governor Josh Shapiro.

item.title: Iran Foreign Minister Expected in Pakistan as Trump Comments on Iran Conflict Impact
item.description: Iran's top diplomat is set to arrive in Pakistan for talks while President Trump stated he views the Iran conflict's effect on markets as less severe than anticipated.

item.title: Intel Stock Poised for Historic Post-Earnings Rally, Analysts Say
Friday's Economic Calendar Centers on Consumer Sentiment Data
